support.title: Support & Contacts
support.subtitle: We're here to help. Choose your preferred channel to get in touch with the eSurf team.

form.title: Send us a message
form.subtitle: We usually respond within 24 business hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to make the most of eSurf.

items.question: What exactly is eSurf?
items.answer: eSurf is the innovative platform that transforms utility management into an active opportunity. You can monitor your consumption, optimize your supplies, and actively contribute to the energy transition.

items.question: Why is it beneficial to share my consumption data?
items.answer: By sharing your data, you help us map energy flows and identify grid inefficiencies. In return, eSurf converts your efficiency into concrete rewards: your savings become your earnings.

items.question: Is there a cost to register and use eSurf?
items.answer: No, using the platform is completely free for end users. Our model is based on the value that data aggregation brings to the national energy grid, not on user subscriptions.

items.question: How does the AI bill analysis work?
items.answer: It's simple: just upload a PDF or a clear photo of your bill. Our AI extracts the essential technical data and cross-references it with your profile to ensure accuracy, security, and zero manual entry errors.

items.question: What types of resources can I connect to the Hub?
items.answer: Currently, we support Electricity (POD code), Natural Gas (PDR code), and Water Services (IDRICO/PDP code).

items.question: What is the difference between a Consumer and Prosumer?
items.answer: A Consumer draws energy from the standard grid. A Prosumer also produces energy (e.g., through solar panels). eSurf provides dedicated analytical tools for both profiles.

items.question: Can I manage utilities for multiple homes or my business?
items.answer: Absolutely. The eSurf Hub automatically groups your resources by physical address. You can add both residential and business utilities in a single, centralized dashboard.

items.question: Do I need Smart Home sensors or devices to start?
items.answer: Not to start. The analysis begins with the official data from your bill. However, the platform is future-proof: you will soon be able to manage your smart assets directly from the Hub.

items.question: Are my data and documents safe?
items.answer: Yes. We adopt bank-level security and encryption standards. Access to your data only occurs after the digital signing of a clear and transparent Delegation and Privacy Policy.

items.question: Who is my data shared with?
items.answer: Aggregated and strictly anonymized consumption data is used to support the power grid and predict demand peaks. Your sensitive data is never sold for telemarketing purposes.

items.question: What happens if the bill I upload is not in my name?
items.answer: The system performs a real-time Cross-Check. If the Tax ID (Codice Fiscale) on the bill does not match your profile, the upload is blocked to protect your privacy.

items.question: Am I locked into eSurf for a minimum period?
items.answer: No lock-in. We guarantee maximum freedom. You can easily Revoke the Mandate for any single resource directly from your Hub with just one click.

home.subtitle: Ciao! I'm e-surf, your energy assistant.
home.main_title: What goal do we want to achieve?
home.desc_cost: I want to lower my bill and keep the savings over time.
home.desc_emissions: I want to transform my home into a zero-impact model.
home.desc_independence: I want to protect myself from price hikes and produce my own energy.

hero.subtitle2: Unlock your energy's value in just 5 steps.

notifications.title: Receive notifications

activation.title: Digital energy identity: activate it now.
activation.description: Evolve from a simple consumer to an active protagonist of the energy transition.

step1.title: 1) Welcome to the energy of the future
step1.subtitle: Upload your bill in one click
step1.description: Start your journey by uploading a photo or PDF of your electricity bill. Our Artificial Intelligence will automatically extract your POD code, committed power, and consumption profiles.

step2.title: 2) Legal Identity
step2.subtitle: Security and Privacy
step2.description: Digitally sign privacy consents and the reading delegation. These 'paperless' documents are essential to ensure the security of your data and allow you to legally operate in the market.

step3.title: 3) Configuration
step3.subtitle: Give value to your devices
step3.description: Enrich your profile by mapping your 'assets': solar panels, batteries, heat pumps, or wall boxes. It is the fundamental step to unlock the true potential of your utility.

step4.title: 4) Strategy
step4.subtitle: Market Potential
step4.description: Our AI calculates your potential for Energy Communities (CER). You will discover if your profile has a 'High', 'Medium', or 'Low' value based on your usage.

step5.title: 5) Excellence
step5.subtitle: Platinum Level
step5.description: Monitor your compliance index. By reaching the Platinum level, you will be ready to start trading energy and actively earning.

notificheHelp.title: notifications
notificheHelp.intro: E-surf notifications are not just alerts, but real enablement tools that allow you to choose the most advantageous options for your energy identity.
notificheHelp.warning: You have not allowed notifications from this app

opp.title: Strategic Opportunities
opp.desc: Receive immediate suggestions based on your REC and D&R Potential, signaling when it's time to participate in exchange markets or energy communities.

comp.title: Compliance Alerts
comp.desc: The system warns you in real-time if legal documents (like delegations or privacy consents) or technical data needed to elevate your profile are missing.

readiness.title: Operational Readiness
readiness.desc: Transforms your meter into an active node of the modern grid, capable of responding to alerts and exchanging flexibility exactly when the market requests it.

platinum.title: Platinum Level Guide
platinum.desc: Every notification is designed to help you climb the energy maturity levels, leading you towards Platinum status to unlock maximum earning and saving capacity.

intro.text: The Digital Energy Identity transforms your POD from a simple meter to a certified profile, enabling you to actively participate and benefit from energy markets.
intro.subtext: It is based on three pillars:

pillar1.title: Strategic Evaluation
pillar1.desc: Artificial Intelligence analyzes your bills to define your potential:

list.cer_desc: Calculates the benefits derived from sharing renewable energy.
list.flex_desc: Evaluates your ability to support grid stability.
list.market_desc: Identifies your commercial value based on user type and consumption.

pillar2.title: Compliance
pillar2.desc: Measures how compliant your profile is to operate legally and technically:

legality.label: Legality
legality.desc: Digitally signed privacy consents and delegations.

grid.label: Grid
grid.desc: Correct association to the Primary Cabin.

curves.label: Load Curves
curves.desc: Reliability and upload of quarter-hourly consumption curves.

assets.label: Assets
assets.desc: Presence of registered physical devices (e.g., solar panels or batteries).

pillar3.title: Readiness
pillar3.desc: Indicates your capacity for immediate action and earning on the market:

tiers.bronze: Initial phase; missing essential documents or data.
tiers.silver: Basic profile; valid legal documents but technical details are absent.
tiers.gold: Advanced profile; ready for detailed simulations.
tiers.platinum: Operational excellence; complete profile and at least one active physical asset to start monetizing.
